Research Opportunities

I am interested in working with students and researchers in the following areas:

Theoretical & Applied Probability Stochastic Processes Epidemic Modelling Mathematical Biology Stochastic Reaction Networks Mathematics of AI & Data Science

If you are interested in working with me in any of these areas, please get in touch!
